UnitAbilities.Title: Iron Priest
UnitAbilities.Text:
While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle units, this model has the
Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blessing of the Omnissiah
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vengeance of the Omnissiah
UnitAbilities.Text: If a friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model is destroyed within 12" of this model, until the end of the battle, this model’s Iron Priest hammer has an Attacks characteristic of 6.

UnitAbilities.Title: High King of Fenris
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in your Charge phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for Adeptus Astartes units from your army and, until the end of the turn, each time an Adeptus Astartes model from your army makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Great Wolf
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1CP.

Infos.Title: LOGAN GRIMNAR LIMITATION
Infos.Text: Your army cannot contain both Logan Grimnar and Logan Grimnar on Stormrider.

UnitAbilities.Title: Refuse to Accept Defeat
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Fierce Eye
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy Infantry unit within 12" of and visible to this model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of the Wolfkin
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, crushing teeth and claws equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mantle of the Troll King
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per phase, when resolving an attack made against this model, after you make a saving throw for this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

UnitAbilities.Title: Born of Wolves
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Alpha Predator
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy units suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

Units.Name: WOLF GUARD BATTLE LEADER IN TERMINATOR ARMOUR

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Wolf Guard Battle Leader in Terminator Armour

Options: relic shield and close combat weapon

WargearDefinitions.Key: relic shield and close combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Relic Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 6.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tactical Precision
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Huskarl to the Jarl
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is attached to a unit that contains another Character model, all Character models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

LeaderInfo.Description: You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one Captain or Chapter Master model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

Keywords: Wolf Guard Battle Leader in Terminator Armour

Options: relic shield and close combat weapon

WargearDefinitions.Key: relic shield and close combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Relic Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 7.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rites of Battle
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Speed of the Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model’s unit.

Units.Name: WOLF GUARD BATTLE LEADER ON THUNDERWOLF

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Wolf Guard Battle Leader on Thunderworlf

Options: storm shield and close combat weapon

WargearDefinitions.Key: storm shield and close combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Storm Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tactical Precision
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aggressive Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, after an enemy unit has finished making its attacks, if this model’s unit was targeted by one or more of those attacks, this model’s unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", but must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit. When doing so, models in this model’s unit can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

LeaderInfo.Description: You can attach this model to the above unit even if one Captain or Chapter Master model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

Keywords: Wolf Guard Battle Leader on Thunderwolf

UnitAbilities.Title: Pelt of the Doppegangrel
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Last Laugh
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6: on a 4+, the attacking unit suffers D6 mortal wounds and is Battle-shocked.

Infos.Title: MASTER OF MISCHIEF
Infos.Text: This model cannot be your Warlord.

UnitAbilities.Title: Morkai’s Howl
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of this unit (if a Lieutenant in Reiver Armour is leading this unit, you can select one enemy unit within 18" instead). That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result if it is a Psyker unit. If that test is failed, in addition to being Battle-shocked, that unit is Stunned until the start of your next Shooting phase. While a unit is Stunned, each time a model in that unit makes a Psychic Attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Reiver Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

InvulSave.Description: This invulnerable save is improved to 4+ against Psychic Attacks.

Options: plasma gun and close combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Headstrong
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit. Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs or an Assault Squad with Jump Packs, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire Discipline
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, if it includes a Long Fang Pack Leader, you can select one enemy unit that is visible to that model. Until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Armorium Cherub
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, after making a Hit roll for a model in this unit, you can change that roll to an unmodified 6.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place an Armorium Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Devastator Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Frozen Prey
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if an enemy Monster or Vehicle unit was hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model’s helfrost destructor, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is Frozen. While a unit is Frozen, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: DAMAGED
UnitAbilities.Text: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Into the Foe
UnitAbilities.Text: If a unit disembarks from this Transport before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

UnitAbilities.Title: DAMAGED
UnitAbilities.Text: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 16 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Storm Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Inspiring Leader
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, once per battle, when a Battle-shock test is taken for that unit, you can re-roll that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pack Leader
UnitAbilities.Text: This model cannot be your Warlord and cannot be given Enhancements.

LeaderInfo.Description: You must attach this model to one of the above units, and can do so even if one or more Character units have already been attached to that unit, but a unit can never include more than one Pack Leader model. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths. If it is not possible to attach this model to a unit, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.

UnitAbilities.Title: Alpha Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Close In for the Kill
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

LeaderInfo.Description: You must attach this model to the above unit, even if Canis Wolfborn has been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths. If it is not possible to attach this model to a unit, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.

Infos.Title: WOLFKIN
Infos.Text: This model cannot be your Warlord and cannot be given Enhancements.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chosen Companions
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Character model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Storm Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save..

Infos.Title: ATTACHED UNIT
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

Options: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour

WargearDefinitions.Key: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour
GrantsAbilities: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour

Values: VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS
Add to the list of units this model can be attached to:

UnitAbilities.Title: Exemplar Warrior
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when this model’s unit is selected to shoot or fight, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Curse of the Wulfen
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 9", its Toughness characteristic to 6, and its Save characteristic to 4+. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Wulfen keyword and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Wulfen, Wulfen with Storm Shields.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fenrisian Terminator Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 5, its Save characteristic to 2+, and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Terminator keyword, it has a 4+ invulnerable save, it gains the Deep Strike ability, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Wolf Guard Terminators.

UnitAbilities.Title: Thunderwolf Mount
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 6, and its Wounds characteristic to 7. Remove the Infantry and Tacticus keywords, add the Mounted keyword, it is equipped with teeth and claws in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Thunderwolf Cavalry.

UnitAbilities.Title: Wolf Lord’s Chosen
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 7", and add to the list of units this model can be attached to: Blood Claws, Grey Hunters, Wolf Guard Headtakers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Storm Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Conversion Field
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Heavy Jump Pack and Mk X Gravis Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 10", its Toughness characteristic to 6 and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Jump Pack, Fly and Gravis keywords, it gains the Deep Strike ability and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Inceptor Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Jump Pack
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", add the Fly and Jump Pack keywords, it gains the Deep Strike ability and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs, Vanguard Veteran Squad with Jump Packs.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mk X Gravis Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 6 and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Gravis keyword and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Gravis (excluding Fly).

UnitAbilities.Title: Mk X Phobos Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: This model gains the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities, remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Phobos keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Eliminator Squad, Incursor Squad, Infiltrator Squad, Reiver Squad, Scout Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Raider-pattern Bike
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 5, and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Infantry and Tacticus keywords, add the Mounted keyword, it is equipped with 1 twin bolt rifle in addition to the weapons you choose in the next step, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Outrider Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Terminator Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 5, its Save characteristic to 2+, and its Wounds characteristic to 5. Remove the Tacticus keyword, add the Terminator keyword, it has a 4+ invulnerable save, it gains the Deep Strike ability, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Terminator Assault Squad, Terminator Squad.

UnitAbilities.Title: Adamantine Will
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Astartes Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blessing of the Omnissiah
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Litany of Hate
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Narthecium
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding Character models) to that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rites of Battle
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tactical Precision
UnitAbilities.Text: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
